title: Package Config Bootstrap Pattern
description: Correct pattern for package-owned OpenWrt configuration: ship predictable /etc/config files, use /etc/uci-defaults only for one-shot detection or migration, and keep service application in init or procd logic.
when_to_use: Use when creating a new package that owns config under /etc/config, needs to bootstrap defaults, or must migrate older config on upgrade.
verification_basis: Verified against current openwrt source checkout under tmp/authoring-repos on 2026-03-28; package Makefiles and installed defaults reviewed directly
